description_long: This is a vintage pocket watch with a round, metallic case and a decorative, engraved back. The front features a white clock face with black and red Arabic numerals, ornate black hour and minute hands, and a smaller subdial for seconds. The winding crown is positioned at the top, attached to a loop for securing a chain. The back of the case is adorned with intricate floral and geometric engravings, giving it an elegant, antique appearance. The sides of the watch are smooth and slightly worn, consistent with frequent handling. The overall finish is matte with some areas of subtle shine, suggesting a well-used but well-preserved timepiece.
description: A vintage round pocket watch with a white face, black and red numerals, ornate hands, and an engraved metallic case.
description_view_0: The front view shows the white clock face with black and red Arabic numerals, ornate hands, and a small seconds subdial.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the slim metallic profile and the winding crown with its attached loop at the top.
description_view_2: The back view displays intricate floral and geometric engravings on the metallic case, with no visible clock face.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the smooth, slightly worn metallic edge and the top-mounted crown and loop.
attribute_face_design: Round white face with black and red Arabic numerals, ornate hands, and a small seconds subdial.
